flows: Build New AEP — Step 1: AEP Setup

Build New AEP: Step 1 — AEP Setup (AEP Title, Adversary Method, Target Context, Example Messages, View More fields)
Step 2 — Test & Refine (Live chat + AI Refine panel + Publish)

key_fields: Quick Actions chips (More casual, Less aggressive, Add urgency, More formal, Shorter, More empathetic)
open_questions_flagged: Is a Reviewer ever mandatory (blocking gate) or always optional?
AEP library scoped per-org vs. per-account/program?
Does 'View More' in Step 1 expose full 6-section form or a subset?
What is the Reasoning panel content model — always AEP-behavior-specific, or can it show general LLM reasoning?

confidence_notes: Figma v2C (Inline AI) designs are detailed and multi-state. All prior research artifacts (prd-research, design-strategy, design-review, edge-cases, user-flow) were read and synthesized. Minor gap: 'View More' fields in Step 1 are not fully visible in Figma — PRD references them as the advanced 6-section model but cannot enumerate every sub-field from the frames available. Step 2 placeholder copy ('Generate Design Element') persists in Figma; PRD describes the intended behavior, not the placeholder.
